data.title: Tether Increases Stake in Bitcoin Mining Firm Bitdeer
data.description: According to PANews, recent filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reveal that Tether has increased its ownership in the Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer. The company's stake has risen from 21% to 22.8%, reflecting Tether's growing interest in the cryptocurrency mining sector.

data.title: Solana’s Vision of Internet Capital Markets: Insights from Lily Liu
data.description:
Lily Liu, President of the Solana Foundation, is looking beyond meme coins to establish Solana as the infrastructure for what she calls “internet capital markets. ” In an exclusive interview with BeInCrypto and a presentation at the 2025 Web3 Festival in Hong Kong, Liu outlined her vision for blockchain technology’s role in democratizing financial access. From Meme Coins to the “Everything Chain” “Solana has evolved from being the DeFi chain to the NFT chain, the gaming chain, the payment chain, and recently the meme coin chain,” Liu explained. “When you sum all that up, Solana is the everything chain
source: https://beincrypto.com/solanas-vision-of-internet-capital-markets-lily-liu/

data.title: Supreme court backs Trump administration in firing of 16,000 federal workers
data.description:
The Supreme Court overturned a lower court's decision, allowing the Trump administration to keep probationary employees off the payroll.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/supreme-court-backs-trump-administration/

data.title: Ethereum Game 'Aavegotchi' Will Dump Polygon for Base, Shutter Layer-3 Network
data.description:
Aavegotchi will migrate from Polygon to Base following a community vote, with the game's layer-3 network Geist set to bite the dust.
source: https://decrypt.co/313913/ethereum-game-aavegotchi-polygon-base-geist

data.title: SEC urges judge to reject outsider’s ‘decisive evidence’ bid in Ripple case
data.description:
According to reports, a man who was previously ordered to pay over $10 million to the US Securities and Exchange Commission has caught the public’s attention after he filed a last-minute request to intervene in the just-concluded Ripple case. The man, identified as Justin W. Keener claims to possess “decisive evidence” that will reportedly favor […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-urges-to-reject-evidence-ripple-case/

data.title: Meta Releases Much-Anticipated Llama 4 Models—Are They Truly That Amazing?
data.description:
Llama is the most popular open-source model in the AI community, and the fourth generation arrived with big promises—and controversy. We tried the model so you don’t have to.
source: https://decrypt.co/313960/meta-llama-4-review

data.title: Solana launches zero knowledge-based Confidential Balances to merge privacy with compliance
data.description:
Solana (SOL) developers have rolled out a sweeping upgrade to their privacy tooling under the banner of “Confidential Balances,” introducing a new suite of cryptographic extensions that discreetly shield token movements while preserving regulatory compliance.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/solana-launches-zero-knowledge-based-confidential-balances-to-merge-privacy-with-compliance/

data.title: RedStone targets trading latency with new oracle on MegaETH
data.description:
RedStone, a blockchain oracle provider, has introduced a push-based oracle on MegaETH to tackle latency issues that challenge the efficiency of onchain trading. According to a spokesperson for RedStone, the new oracle can push new prices onchain every 2. 4 milliseconds. Initially debuting on MegaETH, an Ethereum layer-2 network, the product may be rolled out to additional chains in the future
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/redstone-trading-latency-new-oracle-megaeth?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ex-Kraken Execs Acquire Real Estate Firm, Begin Accumulating Crypto Assets for Treasury Starting With Solana
data.description:
Artificial intelligence (AI)-powered commercial real estate firm Janover, Inc. is announcing that it has raised approximately $42 million through an offering of convertible notes and warrants from multiple investors, including Pantera Capital, Kraken, and Arrington Capital.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/08/ex-kraken-execs-acquire-real-estate-firm-begin-accumulating-crypto-assets-for-treasury-starting-with-solana/

data.title: White House to Increase Tariffs on China by 104%, BTC Down 3%
data.description:
U. S. President Donald Trump escalated tariffs on China to 104%, shaking global markets. Bitcoin dropped over 3% alongside declines in the Nasdaq, S&P, and Dow, as investors reacted to mounting economic pressure.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/white-house-ups-tariffs-against-china-to-104/
